self = <pages.home_page.HomePage object at 0x000001A2B00B41A0>, locator = ('xpath', "//label[contains(text(),'From')]"), city = 'Lucknow'

    def type_city(
        self,
        locator,
        city
    ):
    
        for attempt in range(3):
    
            try:
    
                element = WebDriverWait(
                    self.driver,
                    20
                ).until(
                    EC.element_to_be_clickable(
                        locator
                    )
                )
    
                self.driver.execute_script(
                    "arguments[0].scrollIntoView(true);",
                    element
                )
    
                time.sleep(1)
    
                try:
                    element.click()
    
                except ElementClickInterceptedException:
    
                    self.driver.execute_script(
                        "arguments[0].click();",
                        element
                    )
    
                time.sleep(2)
    
                active = self.driver.switch_to.active_element
    
                active.send_keys(
                    Keys.CONTROL + "a"
                )
    
                active.send_keys(
                    Keys.DELETE
                )
    
                time.sleep(1)
    
                active.send_keys(city)
    
                logger.info(f"TYPED CITY: {city}")
    
                suggestion = WebDriverWait(
                    self.driver,
                    20
                ).until(
                    EC.visibility_of_element_located(
                        (
                            By.XPATH,
                            f"//p[contains(text(),'{city}')]"
                        )
                    )
                )
    
                self.driver.execute_script(
                    "arguments[0].click();",
                    suggestion
                )
    
                logger.info(f"SELECTED CITY: {city}")
    
                time.sleep(2)
    
                return
    
            except (
                TimeoutException,
                StaleElementReferenceException,
                ElementClickInterceptedException
            ) as e:
    
                logger.error(
                    f"RETRY {attempt+1} FAILED FOR {city}: {str(e)}"
                )
    
                time.sleep(3)
